description: Create pipeline template stage. Endpoint: POST /c/{company_id}/offer_templates/{offer_template_id}/pipeline_templates/stages. Required parameters: stage, offer_template_id, source_template_id, company_id.

params.name: stage
params.description: Stage params: name (string, required) - stage name; category (string, required) - stage category; position (integer, required) - stage position; action_templates (array, optional) - stage automated actions; time_limit (integer, optional) - candidate time limit for stage; fair_evaluations_enabled (boolean, optional) - fair evaluation feature status

example_request:
Headers: Content-Type: application/json Body: { "source_template_id": 3329, "stage": { "action_templates": [ { "data": { "attachment_ids": [], "body_html": "
Testing
", "from": null, "from_kind": "admin_performing_action", "send_after_at_hour": 8, "send_after_at_minute": 5, "send_after_days": 181, "send_at_timezone": "Europe/Warsaw", "signature": false, "subject": "Testing subject", "visibility": { "admin_ids": [], "level": "public", "role_ids": [] } }, "kind": "send_email", "references": [] } ], "category": "none", "fairEvaluationsEnabled": false, "group": "active", "locked": false, "name": "Luktuc", "placementsCount": null, "position": "1", "time_limit": null } }

errors.message: Send after days must be less than or equal to 180

send_after_days.message: must be less than or equal to 180
